weather: Acid rain is washing the neon into the gutters today.
Massive static storms in the upper atmosphere — the grid's flickering across three districts.
Smog's sitting low tonight, thick enough to taste the copper in it.
A rare clear sky. The stars are out, which nobody in the Undercity knows what to do with.
Ash is falling again — nobody's confirmed which factory, or if it's even a factory.
Humidity's spiking. Every chrome surface in the city is sweating condensation.
The rain's warm tonight, which everyone agrees is worse than cold rain.
Dust storms rolling in off the dead zone are painting the skyline the color of rust.
Solar flare warnings have half the corp towers running on backup power.
Fog's rolled in so thick the streetlights are just smears of pink and blue.
A light drizzle of something that isn't quite rain is beading on every window in the district.
The wind's carrying ash and ozone tonight — somewhere, something big got fried.
headlines: Sewer Mutants Claim Another Maintenance Crew.
NetVault Denies Data Breach Amid Rumors of Vault-Wide Lockdown.
Underground Cage Fights Linked to Three Missing Persons Cases.
City Council Approves New Surveillance Drone Contract, Citizens Not Consulted.
Black Market Cyberware Recall Ignored by Everyone Who Actually Bought It.
Local Fixer Board Legend Retires, Successor Unknown.
Rogue AI Rumors Resurface After Blackout in the Financial District.
Gang War Truce Brokered by Bartender, City Officials Reportedly Baffled.
Quantum Core Black Market Price Spikes After Latest 'Recovery'.
Chrome Beast Sightings Triple Near the Undercity Rail Line.
Anonymous Tip Leads Corp Security to Empty Warehouse, Again.
NetVault Teller Wins Employee of the Month, Says She 'Feels Nothing'.
RoboDOJO Drone Malfunctions Mid-Sparring Match, Front Desk Blames Waiver.
Static Storms Delay Corp Shipments, Street Prices Climb Overnight.
Missing Fixer's Terminal Found Still Broadcasting Job Postings.
Pit Champion Dethroned, Betting Odds Thrown Into Chaos.
